final:
module SRAM_8bit (
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input [2:0] addr,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory [0:7]; // 8x8 SRAM

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; // Write data to SRAM
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory[addr] ;
  end
endmodule
